name: Classic Shivering Fear
desc: A character physically vibrating from extreme terror.

name: Eye Covering Fear
desc: Covering the face because something is too scary to watch.

name: Sick with Fear
desc: Feeling physically ill or nauseous due to a frightening situation.

name: Face Shield Fear
desc: Shielding the face with both hands while trembling.

name: Pale with Fear
desc: A face turning blue or white from a sudden scare.

name: Cold Sweat Fear
desc: Trembling while breaking out in a cold sweat.

name: Ghostly Fright
desc: A character reacting as if they've seen a ghost.

name: Scared and Crying
desc: A frightened face on the verge of tears.

name: Anxious Worry
desc: A sweat-dropping character feeling deeply uneasy.

name: Fear Faint
desc: Collapsing or fainting from overwhelming terror.

name: Eyes Wide Fear
desc: Trembling with pupils dilated from shock and fear.

name: Gasping Terror
desc: Heavy breathing and trembling due to high stress.

name: Corner Peeking Fear
desc: Peeking from behind a wall to see if the danger is gone.

name: Terrified Intensity
desc: A frighteningly intense expression of deep-seated fear.

name: Panic Cry
desc: Crying out loud in a state of absolute panic.

name: Wide Open Mouth Fear
desc: Trembling with a mouth agape in pure terror.

name: High Alert Fear
desc: A character on high alert, sweating from the tension.

name: Standard Tremble
desc: A simple but effective representation of being scared.

name: Crying Scare
desc: Being surprised and terrified into tears simultaneously.

name: Paralyzed Fear
desc: Being so scared that the character is frozen in place.

name: Ghostly Paleness
desc: A character turning completely pale from a scare.

name: Vibrating Terror
desc: Intense vibration lines indicating massive fear.

name: Exhausted Fear
desc: The feeling of dread that leaves one feeling drained.

name: Stunned Fear
desc: Eyes wide and sweating, unable to process the frightening sight.

name: Deep Shiver
desc: A deep physical shiver caused by a spine-chilling moment.

name: Sad Fright
desc: A mix of being scared and feeling very vulnerable.

name: Hectic Panic
desc: Throwing hands up in a frantic, scared motion.

name: Bug-Eyed Fear
desc: Trembling with extremely dilated, panicked eyes.

name: Shielding Eyes
desc: Using hands to shield the eyes from something scary.

name: Nervous Fear Laugh
desc: A nervous, forced smile while shaking from fear.

name: Cold Sweat Drop
desc: A single drop of cold sweat representing mounting dread.

name: Downcast Fear
desc: Looking down in fear, feeling overwhelmed by a threat.

name: Speechless Terror
desc: A trembling face unable to make a sound from fear.

name: Hollow Fear
desc: Having hollow, lifeless eyes from seeing something terrifying.

name: Mini Shiver
desc: A smaller, subtle shiver of unease or slight fear.

name: Sudden Dread
desc: A sharp reaction to an immediate, frightening realization.

name: Tense Tremble
desc: Highly tense muscles and trembling from anticipation of fear.

name: Gaping Shiver
desc: A mouth wide open and body shaking from a loud scare.

name: Small Animal Fear
desc: A cute, small character looking extremely intimidated.

name: Sweating Worry
desc: A character sweating and shaking from high anxiety.

name: Startled Fear
desc: A sudden startle that leads into a state of fear.

name: Frightened Stare
desc: Staring at the source of fear with a pale face.

name: Helpless Fear
desc: A trembling character feeling completely helpless.

name: Backing Away Fear
desc: Stumbling backward in an attempt to escape something scary.

name: Loud Terror
desc: Representing a scream or a loud gasp of fear.

name: Dazed Fright
desc: Looking completely dazed and frightened like a zombie.

name: Heavy Dread
desc: A face showing the heavy weight of impending doom.

name: Panic Sweat
desc: A character breaking into a sweat from sudden panic.

name: Universal Scare
desc: The most widely recognized kaomoji for being scared.

name: Nervous Fright
desc: A vulnerable and nervous expression of fear.

name: Frantic Terror
desc: A high-energy panic reaction to a scare.

name: Intense Eye Terror
desc: Focusing on the eyes to show the intensity of the fear.

name: Hiding Face
desc: Hiding the face behind hands to avoid seeing a horror.

name: Forced Calm Fear
desc: Trying to act normal while actually being terrified.

name: Anxiety Drop
desc: Using a sweat drop to signal internal anxiety.

name: Sorrowful Fear
desc: A mix of being frightened and being deeply saddened.

name: Silent Scream
desc: A face screaming internally from pure terror.

name: Soulless Fear
desc: Looking like the soul has left the body due to fear.

name: Subtle Shiver
desc: A small shiver indicating something is 'creepy'.

name: Immediate Terror
desc: The precise second a character realizes they are in danger.

name: Tense Shaking
desc: Shaking from head to toe with tense muscles.

name: Agony of Fear
desc: Showing the mental agony of a frightening situation.

name: Tiny Shivering Animal
desc: A very small, cute character shaking with fear.

name: Worried Shiver
desc: Shaking from a combination of worry and fear.

name: Startle Tremble
desc: A face that has just been startled and is now trembling.

name: Pale Stare
desc: A pale-faced stare directed at something scary.

name: Helpless Shaking
desc: Shaking in a state of total helplessness.

name: Fumbling Escape
desc: Attempting to run away but fumbling from fear.

name: Vocal Fear
desc: A character vocalizing their fear through a gasp or shout.

name: Stunned Terror
desc: Being so scared the character looks completely stunned.

name: Weight of Fear
desc: Showing the immense pressure and weight of being afraid.

name: Sweat and Panic
desc: A character sweating heavily due to intense panic.

name: Iconic Horror
desc: The most iconic way to express horror or fear.

name: Vulnerable Fear
desc: A character looking small and vulnerable in the face of fear.

name: Hectic Horror
desc: A frantic and hectic response to a scary event.

name: Wide-Eyed Terror
desc: Focusing on wide, panicked eyes during a scare.

name: Eye Hiding Fear
desc: Hiding the eyes behind hands during a scary scene.

name: Nervous Shiver
desc: A nervous shiver paired with a weak smile.

name: Dread Drop
desc: A drop of sweat indicating growing dread.

name: Unhappy Fright
desc: A mix of being very unhappy and very frightened.

name: Gasping Fear
desc: A character gasping for air while trembling.

name: Shocked Fear
desc: A character looking utterly shocked and fearful.

name: Mild Fear Shiver
desc: A mild physical reaction to a creepy situation.

name: Instant Dread
desc: A sharp, instant reaction of dread and fear.

name: Tense Fright
desc: A state of high tension and fear.

name: Extreme Vocal Fear
desc: A character making a loud noise from fear.

desc: Cowering and trembling like a small animal.
